instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: BerriAI LiteLLM
vulnerabilities.name: BerriAI LiteLLM Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a command injection vulnerability that could allow any authenticated user, including holders of low-privilege internal-user keys, to run arbitrary commands on the host.
vulnerabilities.cisaNotes: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/security/advisories/GHSA-v4p8-mg3p-g94g ; https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.83.7-stable ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42271
vulnerabilities.short_description: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a command injection vulnerability that could allow any authenticated user, including...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Check Point Security Gateway
vulnerabilities.name: Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass user authentication and establish a remote access VPN connection without a valid user password.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
